Slovakia Trade & Professional Registration Requirements Applicability Assessment

The Slovakia Trade License is the mandatory authorization for most companies and sole traders to legally operate business activities in Slovakia. The Trade License is an official certificate granted to legal entities or individuals, permitting them to engage in specified commercial activities under Slovak law.​ It establishes the company’s legal eligibility to do business and is a prerequisite for participation in tax, labor, and facility standards systems. Act No. 455 Collection of Laws on Trades (Trade Licensing Act) Ministry of the Interior Trade Licensing Information Slovak Government Portal Business Registration Guide

The Slovakia Chamber of Commerce and Industry Registration is a business membership within Slovakia’s official chamber network. The registration serves to support businesses through representation, advocacy, legislative updates, export assistance, and networking opportunities provided by the Slovak Chamber of Commerce and Industry. Slovakia Chamber of Commerce and Industry and Act. No. 9 Collection of Laws on the Chamber of Commerce and Industry Act No. 355 Coll. on Protection, Support and Development of Public Health

Is your company registered with the Slovak Chamber of Commerce and Industry in accordance with the Laws on the Chamber of Commerce and Industry, as administered by the Slovak Chamber of Commerce and Industry?
